label: Jurisdiction
notes: Country first with path to subnational later and map joins anchored here

label: Metric
notes: Separate harmonized concept from source-specific definition

label: Observation
notes: Primary GeoBrowser fact entity for country-year comparisons

label: Dataset
description: Logical public dataset or source system

label: DatasetRelease
notes: Needed for reproducibility manifests and per-run provenance

label: IndicatorDefinition
notes: Allows UIS World Bank and later OECD definitions to map to one metric

label: PopulationGroup
description: Reusable slice such as rural girls or school-age children
notes: Keep simple in Phase 1 and use only when sources provide real slices

label: DemographicDimension
description: Atomic disaggregation dimension like sex or residence
notes: Useful for future equity slices but not required for all observations

label: GeographyGeometry
notes: Map-ready boundary asset linked to a jurisdiction but versioned separately

label: School
notes: Defer until school-level ingestion is ready

label: FundingFlow
notes: Do not force aggregate finance indicators into flow structure yet

label: SourceDocument
description: Method note report metadata page or source file
notes: Can be added from docs codebooks release notes and bulk metadata files

label: DataGap
notes: Useful for explicit quality and comparability tracking

label: CompositeIndex
notes: Only after base metrics are stable

label: Claim
notes: Downstream analytic layer not base ontology
